blocks.text: Review/demo mode is a C11 Store App / Local Helper control surface. It lets Store reviewers inspect offline onboarding and status surfaces without requiring provider CLI installation.

`internal/hostintegration.EvaluateReviewDemoMode` enables review/demo mode only for store-managed channels with `review-demo-mode` consent. The enabled mode keeps `ProviderExecutionAllowed=false`, `TelemetrySyncAllowed=false`, and `LocalOnly=true` through the public `internal/riidoapi` `review-demo` method.
`riido api review-demo --channel mac-app-store --review-demo-consent-granted true` is the CLI adapter for the same local control contract. It does not detect or execute provider CLIs.
